title: Edit level curations
description: Customize the curation settings for this level
descriptionLevel: Choose curation types (tags), then edit description, CSS, and color for this level. One curation record per level holds all shared content.
emptyHint: No curations yet. Add a row below, or save now to clear all curations for this level.

form.shortDescriptionHelp: A brief description that will be displayed in gallery views and previews
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a description for this curation...
form.descriptionRequired: Description is required for this curation type
form.customCSSHelp: This CSS will be applied to the level's detail page. Use this to customize the appearance and layout.

warnings.cssUnsupported: The selected type does not support custom CSS on the level page.

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load curations for this level
errors.typeRequired: Select a type for each curation row, or remove empty rows
